nameMeanings.name: Griggs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): from the Middle English personal name Grig, a pet form of Gregory (compare Gregg ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Gregory
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a personal name that was popular throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages. The Greek original, Grēgorios, is a derivative of grēgorein ‘to be awake, to be watchful’. However, the Latin form, Gregorius, came to be associated by folk etymology with grex, gregis ‘flock, herd’, under the influence of the Christian image of the good shepherd. The Greek name was borne in the early Christian centuries by two fathers of the Orthodox Church, Saint Gregory Nazianzene (c. 325–390) and Saint Gregory of Nyssa (c. 331–395), and later by sixteen popes, starting with Gregory the Great (c. 540–604). It was also the name of 3rd- and 4th-century apostles of Armenia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Gregorio , German, Slovak, and Slovenian Gregor , Polish Grzegorz, Czech Řehoř (see Rehor ), and French Gregoire , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Polish Grzegorczyk .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Griggs Jr. was born in 1420, in Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Griggs I. He married Margaret Roslin in 1447, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 27 April 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à St Margaret's Church, Somerton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Griggs Jr.は1420年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソマートンでJohn Griggs Iの息子として生まれた。1447年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでMargaret Roslinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1497年4月27日に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクソマートンスト マルガーエト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Margaret's Church, Somerton, Baber: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴 스트 마가트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Griggs Jr.(은)는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴에서 John Griggs I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Margaret Roslin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1497년 4월 27일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴 스트 마가트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Margaret's Church, Somerton, Baber: ст маргарет'с чурч, сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: John Griggs Jr. родился в 1420 г. в местности сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John Griggs I. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Roslin в 1447 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 27 апреля 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности ст маргарет'с чурч, сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
